speaker: Na
text: Tý, what's your new apartment like?

speaker: Ty
text: It's pretty nice. It's small, but it's very convenient.

speaker: Ty
text: It's downtown, on Điện Biên Phủ Street.

speaker: Ty
text: The location is good. It's near your house.

speaker: Na
text: So I can come and study English with you.

speaker: Ty
text: Yeah, you can come over if you like.

speaker: Ty
text: It has one bedroom, a living room, a kitchen, and a small bathroom.

speaker: Na
text: My house is quite big. It has a small garden too.

speaker: Na
text: How about coming to my house tomorrow? We'll throw a small party.

speaker: Ty
text: Okay, it sounds good. I'll invite some friends too.
